# caido.cr

> Crystal client library for Caido's GraphQL API

This is the documentation for caido.cr, a Crystal client library for Caido's GraphQL API.

## Pages

- [caido.cr](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/): Crystal client library for Caido's GraphQL API

## API Reference

- [CaidoClient](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/client/): The GraphQL client interface
- [Mutations](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/mutations/): Complete mutation module reference
- [Queries](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/queries/): Complete query module reference
- [Utils](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/utils/): Utility functions for query building and security

## User Guide

- [Basic Usage](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/basic-usage/): Client setup, queries, and mutations
- [Getting Started](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/getting-started/): Prerequisites, installation, and your first caido.cr program
- [Mutations](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/mutations/): Working with mutation helpers for write operations
- [Pagination & Filtering](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/pagination-filtering/): Built-in utilities for paginated and filtered queries
- [Queries](https://caido.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/queries/): Working with query helpers for reading data
